title: Smoky Casabe Gratin
description: A gluten-free, smoky twist on the classic French gratin, featuring crispy casabe croutons.

ingredients.name: Casabe
ingredients.notes: Crushed or torn into small pieces

instructions: In a food processor, pulse the crushed casabe until coarsely chopped.
In a separate bowl, mix the shredded smoked Gouda cheese, chopped fresh thyme, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, spread half of the casabe croutons in an even layer.
Top with the cheese mixture, followed by the remaining casabe croutons.
In a separate bowl, mix the softened cream cheese and chopped fresh parsley.
Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the top of the casabe croutons.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
